---
name: New agent proposal
about: Propose adding a new agent to SmartOps
labels: enhancement, new-agent
---

## Agent name

`<name>Agent` — e.g. `SummarizerAgent`

## Responsibility

One sentence: what does this agent own?

## Why a new agent?

Why can't this be handled by an existing agent or a new tool on an existing agent?

## Tools it needs

List the tools this agent would call. Are they new tools or existing ones?

| Tool | New or existing? | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `tool_name` | new / existing | |

## Proposed system prompt outline

Sketch the key sections of the agent's system prompt.

## Success criteria / eval ideas

How would you measure whether this agent is doing a good job?

## Related

Link to any related issues, PRs, or ADRs.
